result.reason: UI elements do not scale correctly on 4k monitors, leading to poor user experience.
result.approach: Investigate and implement high-DPI awareness settings in the application manifest (App.config) and review AutoScaleMode properties for primary UI forms like FrmMain to ensure proper rendering on 4k displays.
